name: iamazing-school-cinematic-typography
description: Remotion React/TypeScript cinematic AI infrastructure typography animation for IAMAZING SCHOOL.

scripts.render:ci: xvfb-run -a npx remotion render src/index.ts IamazingSchool out/iamazing-school.mp4 --codec=h264 --gl=swangle --chromium-flag="--enable-unsafe-swiftshader" --chromium-flag="--ignore-gpu-blocklist" --chromium-flag="--disable-gpu-sandbox" --chromium-flag="--disable-dev-shm-usage" --concurrency=1 --timeout=600000
